title: Korean-Style Pancake with Provolone and Ravishing Twist
description: A fusion dish of Korean-style pancake with melted provolone cheese and a hint of ravishing spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, pancake mix, ravishing powder, and korean chili flakes.
In a separate bowl, mix water and vegetable oil.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in batter and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with grated provola cheese on top (if using).
Optional: add additional ravishing spices to taste.
